title: Ex-CIA 'psychic spy' exposes 'alien bases with UFO repair shops hidden inside mountains'
description: Former CIA psychic spy Lyn Buchanan has claimed he uncovered the coordinates of four top-secret alien bases buried deep inside remote mountains around the world

title: Alien files?: Bozeman UFO experiencers aren't buying it
description: For Ivy McKeehan, the visits began in childhood and never stopped. For Nathan Eastin, it was a one-time sighting in his backyard at night. Both Bozeman residents don’t need the government to tell them that what they saw was real,...

title: China's Nostradamus issues chilling warning about Trump's UFO file release: 'Atrocities are coming'
description: The so-called 'China's Nostradamus' has delivered an ominous prediction following the Trump administration's push to declassify UFO files.
